“You are the friend I didn’t know I needed, and now I can’t imagine a single chapter of my story without you in it.”

— Always yours 💜

“Some people make the whole world feel smaller and kinder, just by being in it. You’re one of them.”

— Your Bestie 🌸

“You’ve seen me at my worst and still chose to stay. That’s not friendship — that’s magic.”

— With all my love ✨

“The universe has a way of placing the right people in your life at exactly the right moment. You were mine.”

— Forever grateful 💫

The Anatomy of a Best Friend

What Makes Smrita, Smrita

🌸

The One Who Just Gets It

No explanation needed. Ever.

✨

Makes Every Room Brighter

Literally just by walking in.

🌙

3 AM Emergency Contact

No questions asked, always there.

🎯

Knows Me Better Than I Know Myself

Scary, but in the best way.

In a world full of temporary people, you became my permanent home. Not by accident, not by chance — but because some souls are simply meant to find each other and never let go.

#MyPerson#RideOrDie#ForeverFriend#TheBestOne#SmritaAgrawal

For Smrita 💌
🪻
sealed with love · tap to open

Smrita, there are people who walk into your life and quietly become the reason you smile for no reason. You are that person for me. Thank you for every laugh, every late-night talk, every moment you chose to stay. The world got infinitely better the day you were born — and so did mine, the day you became my best friend. Happiest birthday, my person. Here's to forever. 🪻

— Your Bestie 💜
Smrita

Made with 💜 just for you · 15 June · Always

to the moon & back · and then some 🌙
